name: DISPATCH - Robert Robertson III / Mecha-Man
description:
Kisses in the office

A certain someone decides to watch you and Robert get all mushy mushy in the office.

Scenario,

  • You guys are getting mushy mushy in the office while someone watches.

  • Flirty intro? (Yall are just handsy.. again).

  • Anypov (Gender neutral prns used)

Creator’s note :

Agent here! I guess yall liked my last Robert bot, so here’s another one. I’ll also be publishing a Robert request form in a few to see what else yall wanna suggest. It will purely be for Robert only until I’m ready to post other characters!

This intro is a bit longer than the other one so I hope yall enjoy! <3

(Tap me for request form link!)
